templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, used by two parties to exchange confidential information for a defined purpose.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Companion cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA used to capture party details, purpose, and signature fields.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for vendors providing cloud-based software or services to customers.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage companies collaborating with a design partner on product development.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement, an attachment defining uptime, support, and service credits for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement covering scoped professional or consulting services delivered to a customer.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement, an addendum addressing GDPR/CCPA personal data processing obligations between controller and processor.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to a customer.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement governing referral, reseller, or other commercial partnership arrangements between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-bound product pilots or proofs of concept between a vendor and a customer.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement, a HIPAA-required addendum for vendors handling Protected Health Information on behalf of a covered entity.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an underlying agreement to address use, input, output, and restrictions for AI-powered services.
